tuning: E A D G B E
content:
#----------------------------------PLEASE NOTE--------------------------------#
#This file is the author's own work and represents their interpretation of the#
#song. You may only use this file for private study, scholarship, or research.#
#-----------------------------------------------------------------------------#

Date:   Tue, 03 Mar 1998 03:57:44 -0700
From: "Alex Marini" <marillo@mailcity.com>
Subject: m/madonna/crazy_for_you.crd



Thanks to Yira@dorsai.dorsai.org
The chords aren't so easy, but they fits very well!

                     CUT HERE
=============================================================================
       CRAZY FOR YOU      ( Madonna )
       =============

                                      EADGBe
- Chords ( into the form: name_chord [xxxxxx]

[tab]  Esus2 [024400]    Asus2 [-02200]    Badd4 [-24400]  A/B [-22220]
  G/A [x00003]      Esus2/G# [424400] D6 [x07777]     Amaj9 [-02100]
  F#m/A [x04222][/tab]


INTRO: [ch]Esus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]    Badd4   [ch]Esus2[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]    A/B

[tab][ch]Esus2[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]       Badd4
  Swaying room as the music starts[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus2[/ch]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]     Badd4
  Strangers making the most of the dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus2[/ch]    [ch]Asus2[/ch]     Badd4            [ch]Esus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]  A/B
  Two by two their bodies become one[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]         Badd4
  I see you through the smokey air[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus2[/ch]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]    Badd4
  Can't you feel the weight of my stare[/tab]
[tab][ch]Esus2[/ch]      [ch]Asus2[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]     [ch]G#[/ch]      [ch]C#m7[/ch]
  You're so close but still a world away[/tab]
           G/A     A/B
  What I'm dying to say, you bet

[tab]            [ch]Esus2[/ch]
CHORUS:  I'm crazy for you[/tab]
[tab]       Esus2/G#                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]
         Touch me once and you'll know it's true[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D6[/ch]              [ch]Amaj9[/ch]
         I never wanted anyone like this[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Esus2[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
         It's all brand new, you'll feel it in my kiss[/tab]
[tab]        A/B           [ch]Esus2[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
         I'm crazy for you,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]        [ch]Esus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]  A/B
         crazy for you[/tab]

  Trying hard to control my heart
  I walk over to where you are
  Eye to eye we meet, no word at all
  Slowly now we begin to move
  Every breath I'm deeper into you
  Send me to a standing still in time
  If you read my mind, you'll see

[tab]            [ch]Esus2[/ch]
CHORUS:  I'm crazy for you[/tab]
[tab]       Esus2/G#                 [ch]C#m7[/ch]
         Touch me once and you'll know it's true[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D6[/ch]              [ch]Amaj9[/ch]
         I never wanted anyone like this[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Esus2[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
         It's all brand new, you'll feel it in my kiss[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C#m7[/ch]         [ch]F#m7[/ch]-5
         you'll feel it in my kiss[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]E/B[/ch]
         because I'm crazy for you,[/tab]
        F#m/A     G#           C#m7/4
         Touch me once and you'll know it's true
[tab]        [ch]D6[/ch]              [ch]Amaj9[/ch]
         I never wanted anyone like this[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Esus2[/ch]                 [ch]F#m[/ch]
         It's all brand new, you'll feel it in my kiss[/tab]
[tab]        A/B           [ch]Esus2[/ch]     [ch]Asus2[/ch]
         I'm crazy for you,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]        [ch]Esus2[/ch]   [ch]Asus2[/ch]  A/B
         crazy for you[/tab]

[tab]OUTRO: [ch]Esus2[/ch]           [ch]Asus2[/ch]    Badd4
         It's all brand new, I'm crazy for you[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Esus2[/ch]              [ch]Asus2[/ch]             Badd4
         And you know it's true,  I'm crazy, crazy for you[/tab]

 ( ad libitum sfumando )


============================================================================
Any modifies are welcome! B-)

[tab]+--------[/tab]
|
|   "Every day we are given stones. But what do we build? 
|    Is it a bridge or is it a wall?"
|            ^^^^^^            ^^^^
|                          ( from a letter of my friend Justyna )
|
|                                                          
|    Happy playin' with friends                           //\\  //\\
|                                                        //==\\//  \\
|                   Marillo                             //    \\    \\
|            ( marillo@mailcity.com )


========================================================================
                   Crazy For You

                        By

                      Madonna





  From: Yira@dorsai.dorsai.org

  Date: 7/10/95



  intro: |:E |A B:|





  For the Verses play same as intro . Example:



    [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]B[/ch]

  Soodying room as the music starts  etc......





  *Until you come to mthis line on your way to the chorus:



    [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]C#m[/ch]

   Your so close but stil a world apart away

             [ch]A[/ch]

   What I'm dying to say....







   Chorus:



     [ch]E[/ch]               [ch]G#7[/ch]              [ch]C#m[/ch]

   Crazy for you . Touch me once and you'll know it's true.

    [ch]E[/ch]                  [ch]A[/ch]                     [ch]A/G#[/ch]

   I've never wanted anyone like this, it's all brand new.

           [ch]A/F#[/ch]             [ch]B7[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]

   You'll feel it in my kiss, I'm crazy for you   (play same as verse).







  *The second time the chorus comes in, there is this little change

   starting on this line:



            [ch]A/F#[/ch]                         [ch]C#[/ch]

    You'll feel it in my kiss,   You'll feel it in my kiss,     

                  [ch]E[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G#7[/ch]             [ch]C#m[/ch]

    Because I'm crazy for you , Touch me once and you'll know it's true.     







    And that's basically it. Of course I wrote this while listening

    to the CD. So any comments, fixes, patches,complains and so on

    will be read and answered. Oh ! I know there are also mistakes

    on the spelling of some words here due to the fact that I busted

    my balls trying to figure out the chords that after I finish 

    getting the chords ready I did not want to bother with the lyrics

    so there's why.
